---
title: "Orphaned Issues"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

_candidates = [Path("data/orphan-issues.json"), Path("../data/orphan-issues.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/orphan-issues.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report orphan-issues"
    )

d        = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group    = d["group"]
projects = d["projects"]
total    = d["total"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>An <strong>orphaned issue</strong> has no epic assigned — it is not tracked within the
portfolio hierarchy.</p>
""")
```

```{python}
if not projects:
    HTML("<p>✅ No orphaned issues found.</p>")
else:
    html = f"<p><strong>{total} orphaned issue(s) across {len(projects)} project(s).</strong></p>"
    for proj in projects:
        html += f"<h3>{proj['name']}</h3>"
        html += """
<table class="table table-sm table-bordered">
  <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Title</th><th>State</th><th>Assignees</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
"""
        for issue in proj["issues"]:
            link      = f'<a href="{issue["url"]}" target="_blank">{issue["title"]}</a>' if issue["url"] else issue["title"]
            assignees = ", ".join(issue["assignees"]) if issue["assignees"] else "<em>Unassigned</em>"
            html     += f"<tr><td>#{issue['iid']}</td><td>{link}</td><td>{issue['state']}</td><td>{assignees}</td></tr>"
        html += "  </tbody>\n</table>"
    HTML(html)
```
